Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava

Class DefaultGuavaRequirements

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava.DefaultGuavaRequirements
All Implemented Interfaces:
GuavaRequirements, Configuration
public final class DefaultGuavaRequirements
extends Object
implements GuavaRequirements
Default implementation of GuavaRequirements.

Implementations must be thread-safe.
